archetype_description: Acts fast when motivated. Needs momentum to be maintained after the first meeting.
data_note: Only 0 entries with this archetype assigned. Profiler has not run on most entries — scores will improve as Lead Psychology Profiler processes more leads.

meeting_guidance.opening_approach: Match their energy. Keep the meeting fast-paced. Don't slow them down with process.
meeting_guidance.what_to_lead_with: The income opportunity and the cost of delay: 'Every month you wait is £X you're not earning.'
meeting_guidance.what_to_avoid: Long timelines or process explanations that feel like obstacles.
meeting_guidance.close_approach: Close in the meeting. If they're urgency-driven, the moment after the meeting is the peak of intent.
meeting_guidance.offer_framing: Set a short expiry (7-10 days). Urgency-driven leads act fast or not at all.

delay_signal_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
green_light_pattern: Insufficient data — fewer than 5 entries with this archetype. Check again after profiler has processed more leads.
